```python
def shortest_palindrome(s):
    if len(s) == 0:
        return ""
    
    # Create the combined string for KMP
    combined = s + '#' + s[::-1]
    lps = [0] * len(combined)
    
    for i in range(1, len(combined)):
        j = lps[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and combined[i] != combined[j]:
            j = lps[j - 1]
        if combined[i] == combined[j]:
            j += 1
        lps[i] = j
    
    # The length of the longest palindromic suffix
    longest_suffix_length = lps[-1]
    
    # Characters to prepend to make it a palindrome
    prefix_to_add = s[:len(s) - longest_suffix_length][::-1]
    
    return s + prefix_to_add

# Read input from standard input
import sys
s = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
print(shortest_palindrome(s))
```
